Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-06 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long SII ranks #1 with an exceptional 92.0 score, driven by extraordinarily consistent long-term momentum—it has delivered 1,012.76% over 10 years while outperforming SPY by 768.53% and QQQ by 532.27% across that same period. All of SII's momentum ratios pass quality thresholds (4 out of 4), it trades above all major moving averages, and shows accelerating returns at each timeframe (35.69% in 1 month to 280.27% in 1 year), though the momentum_signal of 2.29 flags it as "overextended." CLMT ranks second with strong 5-year performance (609.95% return, +537.57% vs SPY), but shows a critical weakness: it has underperformed SPY by 26.8% and QQQ by 263.05% over 10 years, suggesting its momentum is a recent phenomenon rather than secular. SII's 0.579 correlation with IAU (gold) and low correlations with defensive sectors (XLV at 0.008, TLT at -0.008) indicate it operates in a distinct market niche, while CLMT's positive bad_spy_score of 0.
